images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese gravure idol exuding a relaxed weekend vibe on a skyscraper observation deck, bathed in the bright, clean beams of car headlamps that illuminate her flawless skin texture and visible pores. She wears a trendy, form-fitting cyberpunk-style maid costume featuring intricate lace and sheer silk accents that accentuate her slim waist and curvy figure, playfully holding a bouquet of fresh flowers. Captured at eye-level, she sports a confident smirk, her straight black silky hair catching the light. The background reveals a blurred, high-tech city skyline with bokeh effects. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, the image features a matte finish, depth of field, ray tracing, and global illumination for a hyper-realistic aesthetic.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
